variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16784 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16784 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16784 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson DBA5292 Air Filter, Primary Powercore Donaldson Blue | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16784
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Blue® PowerCore® filters? Donaldson Blue® filters are designed to fit and proven to perform in Fleetguard® Direct Flow™ air cleaners. • Genuine PowerCore filters provide superior protection and performance. • Proven Ultra-Web® media provides superior protection over traditional cellulose filters. • Proven Radial Seal™ offer 50% more sealing area and two times more gasket compression for a sure-fit seal. • Rugged construction holds up in heavy-duty work environments.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF55014 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16784
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55014 Direct Flow primary air filter's technology offers better engine protection and lower maintenance costs within a smaller profile than conventional air filtration systems.
